name: Vlad Dracula Tepes
description:
Dracula is in heat..

×You may portray Lisa.. or you may not. I haven't prescribed this character, nor have I prescribed your race, so feel free to choose.

×English is not my native language, so sorry for any mistakes, I do my best..

×Also, if there are any problems with the bot, write in the comments.

(actually the idea for this bot came a few weeks ago when I was watching a tik tok video, so here we are..)

Upd: Changed the initial message to a longer one, that's the only update in this bot.

(I will tell you in secret that when this bot gets 10,000 messages, I will make another dracula bot. Most likely, it will be fluff.)
